data.current_description:
Run a Commerce sync from the last successful sync up to the date provided (optional), otherwise UtcNow is used.
If there was no previously successful sync, the start date in the config is used.
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate Commerce sync to latest date
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a Commerce sync from the last successful sync up to an optional end date (defaults to current UTC time). If no previous successful sync exists, uses the configured start date. Accepts a SyncToLatestArgs object specifying the optional end date. Returns a sync status object indicating the sync has been initiated. The operation is asynchronous; use get-sync-status to monitor progress.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic and doesn't convey the 'to latest' behavior. Description lacks information about the request schema (SyncToLatestArgs), return value, and the asynchronous nature of the operation. These details are essential for AI agents to understand when to use this operation and how to track its completion.
